Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Continued To May-28-08 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 503

(Amended) Ntc Of Mtn For Protective Order
Off Calendar May-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
James M. Emery, Esq., for defendant and moving party: City and County of San Francisco
Keith Cable, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Eddie King
Guy B. Wallace, Esq., for intervenor: Ivana Kirola and Elizabeth Elfman

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion for a protective order is granted. Defendant need not respond to interrogatories. The protective order shall expire on June 6, 2008 in order to permit review by the judge who will be singly assigned for all purposes. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Second Amended Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Intervene
Off Calendar May-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: INTERVENORS IVANA KIROLA AND ELIZABETH ELFTMAN'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO INTERVENE.
APPEARANCES: JAMES M. EMERY, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY (OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.4261) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. MARK T. JOHNSON, ESQUIRE (THE STURDEVANT LAW FIRM, 415.477.2410) APPEARING FOR INTERVENORS. GUY B. WALLACE, ESQUIRE (SCHNEIDER & WALLACE, 415.421.7100) IS PRESENT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. COURT WILL CONFER WITH THE PRESIDING JUDGE RE SINGLE ASSIGNMENT. IF THE SINGLE ASSIGNMENT IS APPROVED, THE CLASS CERTIFICATION MOTION AND THE MOTION TO INTERVENE WILL BE HEARD TOGETHER BY THE SINGLE ASSIGNMENT JUDGE. IF THE SINGLE ASSIGNMENT IS NOT APPROVED, THE MOTION TO INTERVENE WILL BE CONTINUED TO THE MAY 22, 2008. IT WILL BE HEARD AT THE SAME TIME AS THE MOTION TO CERTIFY THE CLASS. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
